sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34742" key="e)na/eros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνάερος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾱ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n34742.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tinted like the air</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Χρῶμα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.915c</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
